message:
test(fwc): expand error_taxonomy and fallback_routing test suites

error_taxonomy: 60 → 165 tests (+105) — covers all error codes, recovery
semantics, retryability, exit code mapping, and edge cases.

fallback_routing: 40 → 111 tests (+71) — covers circuit state transitions,
error rate calculations, cooldown behavior, and suggest-only mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
